summary: Phase 3 — Spark AI chatbot + Razorpay payments. Backend pytest (11/11) + Playwright UI suite both fully green. Chat send/multi-turn/history/sessions/delete/401, Razorpay config/create-order/verify/webhook (all 'not configured' as designed), and the student Buy Now dialog with address validation + 503 toast all behave per spec. Chat FAB correctly absent on admin & instructor dashboards.

issues: Address form input fields appear without visible field labels — only one placeholder ('Area, landmark…') is shown. Other fields (Name, Phone, City, State, Pincode) render as blank outlined boxes. Consider adding visible <label> elements above each input for better a11y and UX.

Stepper label '1. Address' may be visually occluded when a long toast (e.g. the 'Payments are not configured…' banner) appears top-right; consider moving toasts to bottom-right or reducing toast width.

action_items: [Nice-to-have] Add explicit <label> text above each BuyNowDialog input (the testids exist but the visible labels do not).
[Optional] Move sonner toaster to bottom-right or reduce max-width so it doesn't visually overlap the address-stepper labels.
critical_code_review_comments: chat_router.py and payments_router.py both correctly exclude MongoDB _id from responses via projections — good.
payments_router.py /create-order short-circuits with 503 BEFORE touching DB or Razorpay client when keys missing — clean.
payments_router.py /webhook returns 200 status:'skipped' when RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET unset — matches spec and avoids 4xx loops in Razorpay retry queue.
chat_router.py uses Bearer/session JWT via shared get_current_user dependency — unauthenticated POST correctly returns 401 (verified with fresh requests session).
test_credentials: Admin admin@cmsedu.ai / Demo@123 ; Instructor instructor@cmsedu.ai / Demo@123 ; Student STU-9999 (passwordless). All used; all work.
seed_data_creation: None. Tests use a session_id that is created and then deleted in test_delete_session. No persistent test data left over.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 backend + UI fully green with Razorpay keys blank. When the user supplies real RAZORPAY_KEY_ID/SECRET, re-run /api/payments/create-order to verify it returns 201 with order_id; then run a Razorpay test-card checkout from the BuyNowDialog and confirm /api/payments/verify flips student_orders.status from 'Pending' to 'Confirmed'. Webhook test will then need a real X-Razorpay-Signature header (HMAC-SHA256 of body with RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET). Chat suite is stable; LLM replies took ~3-5 s per call so keep the 25-30 s wait in any retest.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in this iteration.
